title: The best systems don't need software
body: The Dabbawalas didn't build a better tracking system. They built a system that doesn't need one. Supply chain complexity is expensive.

title: Leadership is a supply chain problem
body: Getting the right information to the right person at the right time. That's replenishment. That's also leadership.

title: If both levels engage, the translation worked
body: When senior directors and entry-level analysts both react to the same post, I know the message landed.

title: Curiosity over perfection
body: Got inspired by Tiny Experiments by Anne-Laure Le Cunff. I'd rather ship something imperfect and learn than wait for perfect and learn nothing.

title: Inclusion is operational
body: DE&I isn't a side project. It's the same gap as supply chain: the information exists, the execution doesn't.
